((dog_id IN ( SELECT dogs.id
   FROM dogs
  WHERE (dogs.user_id = ( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid)))) OR ((org_id IS NOT NULL) AND is_org_member(org_id)) OR (dog_id IN ( SELECT dog_assignments.dog_id
   FROM dog_assignments
  WHERE ((dog_assignments.trainer_user_id = ( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid)) AND (dog_assignments.status = 'active'::text)))) OR is_parent_of_dog(dog_id))
